block_00: Now available for deposits in India
block_04: Three new convenient payment methods are now on IQ Option! Enjoy instant and secure processing in a few simple steps.
block_06: How to deposit with UPI and Rupay
block_07: Learn how to make a deposit with UPI or Rupay in less than 2 minutes.
block_09: 1. Log in to your IQ Option account and go to the Deposit section.
block_10: 2. Choose the deposit amount and select NetBanking.
block_11: 3. You will be redirected to the relevant payment page. Enter the necessary credentials and authorize your payment transaction.
block_13: We wish you a fantastic trading experience.
